_template_note: PUBLIC policy template for teacher-only holdout extension rounds derived from external sources (for example SWE-bench). Contains NO episode content and NO teacher-only prompt/rubric fields. Teachers use this as a public-safe planning seam, then author real episodes in the existing gitignored private holdout manifest.

meta.honesty_note: Extension rounds described here are manually curated and rewritten from external sources. They remain teacher-only evaluation material, not public curriculum, and not a sealed certification exam.

extension_rounds._instructions: Plan one extension round here, then author the actual teacher-only episodes in benchmarks/private-holdout-pack/holdout-manifest.json. Do not store teacher prompts or scoring rubrics in this tracked file.
extension_rounds.source_snapshot: REPLACE-ME — source release / commit / dataset version for teacher reference
